narr_stable_what: Performance stable with no material deviations.
narr_why_no_number: No single driver dominates; keep monitoring period trends.
narr_do_default: Maintain current operational discipline and monitor cash flow closely.
narr_hm_down_both: Margin dropped {pp} driven by {cat} cost in {branch}
narr_hm_down_branch: Margin dropped {pp} with {branch} as highest pressure
no_companies: No companies yet. Create one above.
upload_notice: Upload & normalize trial balance data. Classification engine coming in Phase 3.
validation_empty: File is empty or has no data
cfo_ai_prompt_no_data: You are a CFO assistant. No data loaded.
cfo_ai_err_401: Session expired. Please log in again.
cfo_ai_err_504: AI service timed out. Please retry.
cfo_ai_welcome_main:
Hello 👋 I'm your AI CFO Advisor for **{company}**.

Period **{period}** · Window {window} · Net Margin **{margin}** · Risk **{risk}**

{validation_block}{dec_block}{loss_block}Ask me anything about the financials.
login_err_connection: Connection error — is the server running?
no_uploads_for_company: No uploads found for this company.
upload_mode_hint_auto: Format is detected automatically from file structure
upload_mode_hint_annual: Upload a full-year trial balance with months as columns
confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this upload?
period_exists_warning: A upload for this period already exists.
period_exists_confirm: Overwrite existing data for this period?
no_uploads_yet: No uploads for this company yet.
chart_upload_to_see: Upload monthly data to see chart
create_company_hint: Create a company from the Dashboard, then upload data
upload_tb_hint: Upload a Trial Balance to see dashboard data
branch_upload_hint: Upload branch trial balances to unlock regional performance breakdown
data_source_branch_vs_company_note: Branch data is based on branch-level uploads and may differ from company consolidated figures.
branches_hint: Create branches and upload branch-level trial balances
branch_confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to deactivate this branch?
branch_delete_warning: This action can be reversed by re-activating the branch.
branch_empty_state: No branches yet. Create your first branch to get started.
upload_branch_linked: Upload will be linked to this branch
sig_gm_compression_cogs_what: Gross margin compressed {delta} pts over {months} months (now {current}% from {prev}%).
sig_gm_compression_cogs_why: COGS grew {cogs_growth}% vs revenue growth of {rev_growth}% — cost of goods sold is outpacing revenue.
sig_gm_compression_cogs_rec: Renegotiate supplier terms. Review product mix: shift toward higher-margin offerings. Audit procurement costs.
sig_gm_compression_what: Gross margin compressed {delta} pts over {months} months (now {current}% from {prev}%).
sig_gm_compression_why: Revenue growth is not translating into proportional profit.
sig_gm_compression_rec: Review pricing power. Consider selective price increases on highest-demand products.
sig_gm_drop_why: Sudden increase in cost of goods sold or decrease in selling price.
sig_gm_drop_rec: Investigate specific cost drivers this period. Check for one-off purchases or unusual pricing discounts.
sig_rev_decline_what: Revenue declined for {streak} consecutive months. Current: {current}.
sig_rev_decline_why_struct: Cumulative decline: {total}% from peak. Year-over-year also negative — may indicate structural decline.
sig_rev_decline_why_seasonal: Cumulative decline: {total}%. Year-over-year still positive — likely seasonal pattern.
sig_rev_decline_why_basic: Revenue has declined for {streak} consecutive months.
sig_rev_decline_rec_urgent: URGENT: Activate revenue recovery plan. Identify top-5 accounts at risk. Review pricing and competitive positioning immediately.
sig_rev_decline_rec_normal: Analyse whether decline is concentrated in specific products or channels. Review customer retention and churn rates.
sig_rev_drop_why_np: Revenue fell sharply. Profit fell even harder — cost structure is not adjusting to lower volume.
sig_rev_drop_why: Revenue fell sharply. Profit decline was proportional — fixed cost base is absorbing the reduction.
sig_rev_drop_rec: Identify whether this is a one-off event (lost contract, seasonal, market shock) or the start of a trend.
sig_rev_recovery_what: Revenue recovered +{mom}% in {period} after prior decline.
sig_rev_recovery_why: Positive reversal following a down period — recovery may be underway.
sig_rev_recovery_rec: Monitor for 2 more months to confirm recovery is sustained before declaring trend reversal.
sig_cogs_ratio_what: COGS represents {ratio}% of revenue — above the {threshold}% threshold.
sig_cogs_ratio_why: High cost of goods sold leaves insufficient gross margin to cover operating expenses and profit.
sig_cogs_ratio_rec: Conduct a cost-per-unit analysis. Identify top 3 COGS drivers. Evaluate supplier alternatives or production efficiency gains.
sig_opex_faster_what: Operating expenses grew {opex_mom}% in {period} while revenue grew {rev_mom}% — OpEx outpacing revenue by {delta} pts.
sig_opex_faster_why: Operating expenses are scaling faster than revenue, compressing operating margin.
sig_opex_faster_rec: Review discretionary spending. Implement expense controls if OpEx growth exceeds revenue growth for a second consecutive month.
sig_opex_ratio_why: High operating expense ratio reduces profitability and leaves less buffer for unexpected costs.
sig_opex_ratio_rec: Benchmark OpEx ratios against industry standards. Identify largest fixed cost components and evaluate reduction opportunities.
sig_rev_profit_div_what: Revenue grew {rev_mom}% but net profit fell {np_mom}% in {period} — revenue-profit divergence.
sig_rev_profit_div_why: The company is generating more revenue but converting less of it to profit. Cost structure is growing faster than pricing power.
sig_rev_profit_div_rec: Investigate which cost line is absorbing the revenue gain. Review whether new revenue is coming at lower margins.
sig_np_severe_why: Severe profit drop in a single period is unusual and warrants immediate investigation.
sig_np_severe_rec: Immediate CFO review required. Identify whether this is an accrual timing issue, one-off expense, or structural problem.
sig_np_growth_what: Net profit has grown for 3+ consecutive months.
sig_np_growth_why: Sustained profit improvement indicates positive operational momentum.
sig_np_growth_rec: Identify which factors are driving improvement and protect them. Consider investing gains back into growth drivers.
sig_dol_high_why: A 1% change in revenue produces a {dol_abs}% change in operating profit. High DOL amplifies both growth and decline.
sig_dol_high_rec: Ensure revenue forecasts are conservative. A revenue shortfall will have outsized impact on operating profit.
sig_dol_neg_warn: Negative operating leverage (DOL={dol}): operating profit moved opposite to revenue — investigate cost structure.
sig_ebitda_gap_what: EBITDA margin ({ebitda}%) significantly exceeds net margin ({nm}%) by {gap} percentage points.
sig_ebitda_gap_why: Large EBITDA-to-Net-Profit gap indicates material depreciation, interest, or tax burden.
sig_ebitda_gap_rec: Review financing costs and tax planning. High D&A relative to cash flow may indicate heavy asset base.
sig_inc_margin_what: Incremental margin is {pct}% — each additional unit of revenue is highly profitable.
sig_inc_margin_why: Revenue growth is translating efficiently to profit, indicating operating leverage in action.
sig_inc_margin_rec: Prioritise revenue growth — the marginal economics are favourable.
sig_inc_margin_neg_warn: Negative incremental margin ({pct}%): additional revenue is costing more than it earns.
sig_risk_critical_warn: Risk profile is CRITICAL ({factors} risk factors). Multiple financial stability metrics are deteriorating simultaneously.
sig_risk_critical_rec: Immediate board-level review required. Prepare a risk mitigation plan addressing cost structure, revenue volatility, and earnings consistency.
sig_risk_high_warn: Risk profile is HIGH ({factors} risk factors). Financial metrics show elevated volatility.
sig_gm_vol_what: Gross margin volatility is {std} percentage points std dev over {periods} periods.
sig_gm_vol_why: High margin volatility indicates inconsistent pricing power or fluctuating input costs.
sig_gm_vol_rec: Investigate root causes of margin swings. Consider hedging input cost risk or implementing pricing escalation clauses.
sig_earnings_incons_what: Earnings consistency score is {score}/100 — profit is unpredictable.
sig_earnings_incons_why: Only {pos}% of periods had positive profit; {grow}% showed profit growth.
sig_earnings_incons_rec: Stabilise the revenue base through longer-term contracts and reduce fixed cost exposure.
sig_cost_struct_what: Cost structure: COGS averages {cogs}% of revenue, OpEx {opex}% — classified as '{type}'.
sig_cost_struct_why_product: Product/procurement costs dominate the cost base — margin is highly sensitive to input prices and volume.
sig_cost_struct_why_opex: Operating expenses dominate — business has high fixed cost leverage.
sig_cost_struct_why_balanced: Balanced cost structure between variable and fixed costs.
sig_cost_struct_rec_product: Focus cost reduction on procurement and supplier terms.
sig_cost_struct_rec_opex: Focus on revenue scaling to absorb fixed OpEx base.
sig_cost_struct_rec_balanced: Maintain current balance; monitor for structural shifts.
sig_rev_vol_what: Revenue stability score is {score}/100 (CV={cv}) — high volatility.
sig_rev_vol_why: Revenue swings significantly between periods, making cash flow planning difficult.
sig_rev_vol_rec: Diversify revenue streams. Introduce recurring revenue components to smooth monthly variability.
sig_asset_turn_what: Asset turnover is {at}x — assets generating low revenue relative to their value.
sig_asset_turn_why: Low asset turnover indicates under-utilisation of the asset base.
sig_asset_turn_rec: Review idle assets for disposal or leasing. Assess whether capital is deployed in highest-return activities.
sig_rec_turn_why: Slow collections are tying up working capital.
sig_rec_turn_rec: Implement stricter credit terms. Offer early-payment discounts. Escalate overdue accounts proactively.
sig_ccc_good_what: Cash Conversion Cycle of {ccc} days is efficient.
sig_ccc_good_why: Short CCC means the company converts investments back to cash quickly.
sig_ccc_good_rec: Protect this efficiency advantage. Monitor for deterioration if volumes change.
sig_cf_strong_what: Strong cash conversion: OCF {ocf} vs Net Profit {np} (ratio {ratio}x).
sig_cf_strong_why: Operating cash flow closely matches or exceeds net profit — earnings quality is high.
sig_cf_strong_rec: Maintain current working capital discipline. Strong cash conversion supports dividend capacity and debt service.
sig_cf_weak_what: Earnings quality risk: Net Profit {np} but OCF only {ocf}. Cash gap of {gap}.
sig_cf_weak_why: Significant portion of reported profit is not converting to cash. Likely tied up in receivables or inventory.
sig_cf_weak_rec: Investigate working capital: accelerate collections, reduce inventory levels, and review payables terms.
sig_cf_weak_warn: Earnings quality risk: profit {np} not converting to cash (OCF {ocf}).
sig_cf_neg_why: Operations are consuming more cash than they generate. Working capital build-up or losses are draining cash.
sig_cf_neg_rec: Review working capital management urgently. Reduce receivables, liquidate excess inventory, negotiate extended payables.
sig_cf_neg_warn: Negative operating cash flow ({ocf}). Operations consuming cash.
sig_rec_stress_what: Receivables increased by {delta} this period — working capital stress.
sig_rec_stress_why: Growing receivables tie up cash and increase collection risk.
sig_rec_stress_rec: Review credit terms with customers. Follow up on overdue accounts. Consider invoice discounting.
sig_burn_why: The company is consuming cash faster than it is generating it.
sig_burn_rec_urgent: URGENT: Less than 3 months cash runway. Immediate action required: cut discretionary expenses, accelerate revenue collection, or secure financing.
sig_burn_rec_normal: Reduce burn rate by cutting non-essential expenses and accelerating revenue.
sig_burn_recs: Reduce monthly cash burn through cost controls and revenue acceleration.
sig_fcf_neg_why: After capital expenditure, cash generation is insufficient.
sig_fcf_neg_rec: Review capex spending. Defer non-critical investments until operating cash flow improves.
forecast_rev_up: Revenue projected to grow to approximately {point} (range: {low}–{high}).
forecast_rev_down: Revenue projected to decline to approximately {point} (range: {low}–{high}).
forecast_rev_flat: Revenue projected to remain stable at approximately {point}.
forecast_np_up: Net profit expected to improve to around {point}.
forecast_np_down: Net profit expected to decline to around {point}.
forecast_np_flat: Net profit expected to remain near {point}.
forecast_volatility_warning: High volatility in recent revenue — forecast range is wide. Treat as directional guidance only.
forecast_insufficient_data: Minimum {n} periods of data required for forecasting.
cashflow_positive: Cash flow positive — business generating sufficient cash
cashflow_chart_title: Net Profit vs Operating Cash Flow
rc_rev_consistent_growth: Revenue grew for {streak} consecutive months (avg {avg_mom}% MoM). Current: {current}.
rc_rev_structural_decline: Revenue declined {streak} consecutive months (avg {avg_mom}% MoM). Current: {current}.
rc_profit_rev_driven_growth: Profit grew {mom}% — driven by revenue expansion ({driver_pct}% attributable to top-line growth). Current: {current}.
rc_profit_margin_expansion: Profit improved due to COGS ratio reduction of {delta_cogs} pts. Current: {current}.
rc_profit_opex_efficiency: Profit improved through OpEx ratio reduction of {delta_opex} pts. Current: {current}.
rc_profit_rev_driven_decline: Profit declined {mom}% — revenue contraction of {delta_rev} is the primary cause. Current: {current}.
rc_profit_margin_compression_cogs: Profit fell due to COGS ratio increase of {delta_cogs} pts — cost of goods rising faster than revenue. Current: {current}.
rc_profit_opex_overrun: Profit fell as OpEx ratio grew {delta_opex} pts — operating expenses outpacing revenue. Current: {current}.
rc_profit_insufficient_data: Insufficient period data for profit decomposition.
rc_cf_strong_conversion: Strong cash conversion: OCF {ocf} closely tracks profit {np} (ratio {ratio}x).
rc_cf_wc_drag: OCF {ocf} lags profit {np} (gap: {gap}) — working capital drag from {driver}.
rc_cf_weak_conversion: Cash conversion weak: OCF {ocf} vs profit {np} (ratio {ratio}x, gap {gap}).
rc_cf_negative: Negative OCF {ocf} despite profit {np} — net WC outflow of {wc_net} absorbing cash.
rc_cf_moderate: Moderate cash conversion: OCF {ocf} from profit {np} (ratio {ratio}x).
rc_cost_structure_improving: Cost structure improving: COGS {cogs}%, OpEx {opex}% — both declining as % of revenue.
rc_cost_structure_deteriorating: Cost structure under pressure: COGS {cogs}%, OpEx {opex}%. Primary driver: {primary_driver}.
rc_cost_insufficient_data: Insufficient data for cost structure analysis.
rc_drv_rev_volatile: High revenue volatility (CV={cv}) — inconsistent demand or seasonal patterns.
rc_drv_rev_accelerating: Revenue momentum accelerating by {delta} pts MoM.
rc_drv_rev_decelerating: Revenue momentum decelerating by {delta} pts MoM.
rc_drv_profit_from_revenue: Revenue change of {delta_rev} contributed approximately {contribution} to profit.
rc_drv_profit_from_cogs: COGS ratio {direction_word} by {delta_pct} pts — contributing {contribution} to profit change.
rc_drv_profit_from_opex: Operating expenses {direction_word} by {delta_pct} pts — contributing {contribution} to profit change.
rc_drv_cf_da_addback: D&A addback of {da} (non-cash item adds to OCF).
rc_drv_cost_cogs_shift: COGS at {current}% ({direction_word} average of {avg}% by {delta} pts).
rc_drv_cost_opex_shift: OpEx at {current}% ({direction_word} average of {avg}% by {delta} pts).
cc_section_key_signals_hint: Cost driver, weakest unit, and urgent alerts — from the same executive payload.
cc_no_key_signals: No key signals for this scope yet.
cc_section_performance_hint: Revenue, expense, margin context, and health — last period in scope.
cc_section_branch_intel_hint: Ranking, cost pressure, and efficiency (consolidated branch view when enabled).
cc_no_branch_intel: No branch comparison in this payload. Add branches or enable consolidation.
cc_no_expense_decisions: No expense decisions for this scope.
cmd_performance_sub: Score, period context, and core KPIs for the active scope.
cmd_key_signals_sub: Quick deltas — the narrative above explains the full picture.
cmd_branch_intel_sub: Rankings and pressure from the same executive scope.
cmd_kpi_margin_period_note: Figures reflect the latest period in your KPI window.
cmd_secondary_why_forecast: Why it matters: preview how base-case revenue and profit move into the next period.
cmd_secondary_why_domains: Why it matters: open liquidity, efficiency, profitability, and leverage in one workflow.
cmd_secondary_why_alerts: Why it matters: triage severity and context before they hit the P&L.
cmd_secondary_why_statements: Why it matters: drill to full P&L, balance sheet, and cash flow detail.
cmd_secondary_compact_domains_why: Liquidity, efficiency, profit, leverage in one flow.
cmd_chart_bridge_footnote: Bridge uses the latest two periods in the KPI window. Total cost = COGS + operating expenses from the same series as KPI expenses.
cmd_chart_branch_empty: No branch comparison data for this scope.
cmd_chart_branch_header_hint: Click title above for bar comparison by branch.
cmd_decisions_sub: Expense intelligence — act on these first.
cmd_decisions_sub_ei: Grounded in expense intelligence — categories, ratios, and anomalies.
cmd_page_sub: Executive hub — use Analysis or Statements for tactical depth
ai_cfo_empty: Try profit, revenue, costs, cash, decisions, or health — answers use your current Command Center scope only.
ai_cfo_need_data: Load executive data for this company and period to get scoped answers.
ai_cfo_fallback_what: No single headline dominated this snapshot — scan KPIs for the full picture.
ai_cfo_fallback_why: Drivers are mixed; use domain scores and the executive narrative for context.
ai_cfo_fallback_do: Work the ranked decisions first, then validate depth in Analysis.
ai_cfo_intel_np_pressure_expense: Net profit is {np} (MoM {npm}). Expenses moved {em} MoM while revenue moved {rm} — cost momentum is pressuring the bottom line in this window.
ai_cfo_intel_np_pressure_revenue: Net profit is {np} (MoM {npm}). Revenue moved {rm} MoM vs expenses {em} — softer top-line momentum is the dominant drag here.
ai_cfo_intel_np_positive: Net profit is {np} (MoM {npm}); revenue MoM {rm} and expense MoM {em} net out to a constructive trajectory for this scope.
ai_cfo_intel_np_neutral: Net profit is {np} (MoM {npm}) with revenue MoM {rm} and expense MoM {em} — the mix explains most of the move.
ai_cfo_intel_cash_profit_bridge: Net profit is {np} (MoM {npm}); reconcile timing vs operating cash conversion in Analysis if cash and profit diverge.
ai_cfo_intel_snapshot_rev_np: Revenue {rev} and net profit {np} in the active window — read them together, not in isolation.
ai_cfo_intel_rev_profit_link: Revenue momentum {rm} vs net profit momentum {npm} — {np} is the outcome of both cost and revenue forces.
ai_cfo_intel_margin_bridge: Margin is shaped by revenue momentum ({rev}) against expense momentum ({exp}).
ai_cfo_primary_tie: Align next steps with your primary recommendation: {title}.
ai_cfo_fu_q_deeper: Want a tighter KPI bridge for this period?
ai_cfo_fu_q_deeper_fill: Break down revenue, expenses, and margin for this scope.
ai_cfo_fu_q_branch_fill: Explain branch-level cost and revenue pressure in my current scope.
ai_cfo_fu_q_action: Want an action plan from ranked decisions?
ai_cfo_fu_q_action_fill: What should I do first based on my ranked decisions?
ai_cfo_fu_q_cash: Explain operating cash vs profit in more detail?
ai_cfo_fu_q_cash_fill: Explain my operating cash position versus net profit.
drill_intel_net_margin_level: Net margin level in this view: {pct}.
drill_intel_what_fallback: Review KPI momentum in the strip above (MoM % and YoY %).
drill_intel_why_fallback: Compare revenue vs. expense momentum using the % values on the KPI cards.
drill_intel_do_fallback: Work through decision #1 in the ranked list, then validate details in Analysis.
drill_intel_tab_fallback_hint: Limited ratio breakdown for this tab — KPI summary below stays in scope.
drill_sig_rev_mom_up: Revenue increased {pct} {mom_word} versus the prior period.
drill_sig_rev_mom_down: Revenue decreased {pct} {mom_word} versus the prior period.
drill_sig_rev_mom_flat: Revenue was unchanged versus the prior period.
drill_sig_exp_mom_up: Expenses increased {pct} {mom_word} versus the prior period.
drill_sig_exp_mom_down: Expenses decreased {pct} {mom_word} versus the prior period.
drill_sig_exp_mom_flat: Expenses were unchanged versus the prior period.
drill_sig_expense_faster_than_revenue: Expenses are growing faster than revenue (MoM %).
drill_sig_operating_loss: The business is operating at a loss in this period view (net profit < 0).
drill_sig_branch_panel_context: Branch comparison ranks expense pressure relative to revenue in the chart above.
drill_sig_alert_severity_high: High-severity signal—validate cash, margin, and near-term commitments.
drill_sig_alert_severity_watch: Signal logged—cross-check against KPI momentum and decisions.
drill_sig_domain_score_stress: {domain} score ({score}/100) is in a stressed band.
drill_sig_ratio_pressure: {label} is in a risk band in this view.
drill_sig_tab_liquidity_what: Liquidity view focuses on short-term solvency and working capital.
drill_sig_tab_liquidity_why_hint: Use current and quick ratio rows below for period-specific stress cues.
drill_sig_tab_efficiency_what: Efficiency view ties cost and asset utilization to revenue.
drill_sig_tab_efficiency_why_hint: Review efficiency ratios and branch expense mix in context below.
cmd_source_data_tooltip: Source or system text (may be untranslated)
cmd_ar_backend_insight_placeholder: Open full analysis for the detailed insight.
cmd_ar_anomaly_summary_hint: Open analysis for full anomaly details.
cmd_primary_baseline_footer: Priority actions surface here as signals fully converge.
cmd_intel_mosaic_zone_aria: Executive intelligence layer — forecast, modules, and profit path
cmd_intel_mosaic_forecast_loading: Forecast payload loading — tap for full projection workspace.
cmd_intel_mosaic_forecast_tap: Tap for full forecast · scenarios · trajectory
cmd_intel_mosaic_bridge_aria: Profit path bridge — expand for interactive segments
cmd_intel_mosaic_bridge_tap: Tap for full bridge · segment drill
cmd_intel_ws_bridge_interactive: Interactive period bridge (revenue → cost → opex → operating → net)
cmd_intel_ws_bridge_driver_hint: Among revenue, COGS, and OpEx deltas in this period view
cmd_intel_bridge_action_primary: Reconcile the period using the largest mover: {driver}.
cmd_intel_bridge_net_up: Net profit improved period-over-period — hold gains and watch cost pass-through.
cmd_intel_bridge_net_down: Net profit declined period-over-period — prioritize the bridge segments above.
cmd_intel_bridge_net_flat: Net profit flat — small operational changes can swing the next period.
cmd_intel_bridge_paradox_rev_up_np_down: Paradox: revenue up but net profit down — cost absorption exceeded the revenue gain.
cmd_intel_bridge_paradox_rev_down_np_up: Unusual mix: revenue down but net profit up — verify one-offs and cost cuts.
cmd_intel_tile_scenarios_sub: CFO AI · models and deep questions
cmd_intel_tile_liquidity_sub: Cash and working capital — open domain drill
cmd_intel_expanded_chart_empty: Not enough periods in this scope to draw this trend.
cmd_intel_expanded_drill_empty: No structured interpretation lines for this view yet — use the health rail for full domain context.
cmd_intel_expanded_alerts_empty: No active alerts in this scope.
cmd_intel_action_primary_baseline: Stabilize signals — no ranked expense decision in this scope yet.
cmd_intel_rec_scen_kpi_only: Use KPI trends until forecast loads.
cmd_intel_rec_scen_conservative: High volatility — bias to risk scenario for liquidity tests.
cmd_intel_rec_scen_growth: Momentum supports upside — monitor optimistic vs base.
cmd_intel_ws_immediate_alerts: Resolve or escalate high-severity alerts first; they directly affect the composite risk score.
cmd_exec_layer_aria: Execution layer — what to do next
cmd_exec_layer_sub: Prioritized moves, open decisions, and alert resolution — grounded in this scope’s executive data.
cmd_exec_action_why_expense_default: Expense signal ranked in this window — detail shows levers.
cmd_exec_action_why_decision_default: System-ranked CFO decision for this scope.
cmd_exec_pipeline_empty: No ranked CFO decisions in this payload — actions above use alerts and narrative.
cmd_exec_alerts_empty: No active alerts in this scope.
cmd_exec_alert_why_high: High-severity signal — validate cash, margin, and commitments before next period.
cmd_exec_alert_why_watch: Logged signal — cross-check against KPI momentum and decisions.
cmd_exec_alert_resolve: Assign owner; reconcile {domain} drivers in working session, then confirm in alerts view.
cmd_exec_next_fallback: Refresh scope after actions; re-check liquidity and margin tiles in the intelligence layer.
cmd_exec_next_data_only: Execute the ranked moves above, then re-check liquidity and margin tiles for confirmation.
cmd_exec_impact_qual_ar: Open the detail panel — service text is not Arabic-safe for a surface summary.
cmd_exec_instruction_panel: Open the detail panel to validate levers, owners, and figures.
cmd_exec_insufficient_title: No ranked decision in this scope
cmd_exec_insufficient_why: CFO decisions and expense programs are absent or baseline-only in this payload.
cmd_exec_insufficient_impact: No modeled line item to quantify on this surface.
cmd_exec_insufficient_action: Widen the period scope or complete data capture, then refresh.
cmd_intel_digest_scenarios_no_fc: Forecast not loaded — anchor scenarios on KPI history until forecast returns.
cmd_intel_bridge_flow_legend: Flow: revenue → COGS → OpEx → operating profit → net (period Δ).
cmd_secondary_fc_empty: No forecast preview for this scope — open analysis or adjust the period window.
cmd_secondary_tile_domains_sub: Liquidity, efficiency, profitability, and risk in full analysis.
cmd_secondary_tile_alerts_none: No active alerts in this scope.
cmd_secondary_tile_statements_sub: P&L, balance sheet, and cash flow detail.
cmd_decisions_prioritized_sub: Prioritized actions — owners and horizons when provided by the decision engine.
cmd_expense_insights_sub: Category load, ratio, and MoM change from the same engine as expense decisions.
cmd_expense_weak_data: Add more monthly periods to unlock category trends and MoM expense change.
cmd_expense_no_category_split: No category split for this period.
cmd_expense_mom_na: Needs a prior period in scope.
cmd_expense_no_mover: No category increase vs prior period.
cmd_sig_no_anomalies: No critical anomalies detected. Operations stable.
cmd_branch_no_pressure: No branch-level pressure detected this period.
cmd_decision_baseline: Maintain current operational discipline and monitor cash flow closely.
exec_overall_excellent: Business performing strongly — all key metrics positive.
exec_overall_good: {good_count} of {domains} areas healthy — minor areas to watch.
exec_overall_critical: Critical issues require immediate executive action.
exec_profit_excellent: Profitability is strong at {nm}% net margin. Protect this position.
exec_profit_good: Healthy profitability at {nm}% net margin. Push toward 15%.
exec_profit_warning: Profit margin is shrinking ({nm}%). Costs are eating into earnings.
exec_profit_critical: Business is near break-even at {nm}% net. Immediate cost action needed.
exec_liq_excellent: Cash position is solid. The business generates more cash than it needs.
exec_liq_good: Liquidity is comfortable. Monitor working capital monthly.
exec_liq_warning: Cash is tightening. Some profit is not reaching the bank account.
exec_liq_critical: Cash shortage risk. Operations may struggle to meet obligations.
exec_growth_excellent: Business grew {yoy_rev}% this year — momentum is strong.
exec_growth_good: Revenue up {rev_mom}% and Net Profit up {np_mom}% — growth is converting.
exec_growth_partial: Revenue is recovering but Net Profit is not following yet. Watch cost pressure.
exec_growth_declining: Revenue dropped {rev_mom}%. Immediate executive action required.
exec_growth_stagnant: Revenue is flat. Identify the next Growth Rate lever to restart momentum.
exec_cost_improving: Total Costs are falling as a % of Revenue — Net Margin is expanding.
exec_cost_stable: Cost structure is stable. Total cost load is {total}% of revenue.
exec_cost_warning: Total Costs are rising faster than Revenue. Total at {total}% of Revenue.
exec_cost_critical: Cost overrun — only {nm_implied}% left for profit. Urgent review needed.
exec_risk_excellent: Business risk is low. Operations are stable and predictable.
exec_risk_good: Risk is under control. {risk_factors} minor item(s) to watch.
exec_risk_warning: Risk is elevated. {risk_factors} issue(s) need active attention.
exec_risk_critical: High-risk situation. Escalate to senior management immediately.
exec_act_protect_margin: Protect the {nm}% margin — avoid discounts that erode profit.
exec_act_grow_revenue: Revenue growth is the priority — cost structure can support it.
exec_act_review_costs: Review the largest cost lines — margin at {margin}% needs improvement.
exec_act_emergency_cost_review: Stop all non-essential spending immediately. Margin at {margin}% is unsustainable.
exec_act_dol_sensitivity: Revenue is sensitive to drops — at {dol}x leverage, a 10% Revenue decline hits profit hard.
exec_act_scale_revenue: Incremental Revenue adds {inc_margin}% to profit — now is the time to grow.
exec_act_maintain_liquidity: Cash flow is healthy. Keep the same payment collection discipline.
exec_act_monitor_wc: Keep an eye on receivables and inventory — cash can be tied up there.
exec_act_accelerate_collections: Chase overdue invoices — some cash is sitting with customers.
exec_act_cash_emergency: Arrange a credit line. Cash may not cover obligations soon.
exec_act_wc_deteriorating: Receivables or inventory building up ({wc}). Investigate why cash is delayed.
exec_act_cash_runway_low: Only {runway} months of cash at current burn. Arrange financing now.
exec_act_sustain_growth: The {yoy_rev}% growth is real — invest in what's driving it.
exec_act_convert_growth_to_profit: Revenue is growing but profit is not keeping up. Control cost growth.
exec_act_revenue_recovery: Revenue down {rev_mom}%. Launch a recovery plan this week.
exec_act_identify_growth_lever: Revenue is flat. Identify which Key Drivers can restart growth.
exec_act_yoy_momentum: Annual growth at {yoy}% — protect whatever is driving this.
exec_act_lock_in_savings: Costs are down — lock in supplier agreements before they rise again.
exec_act_cost_benchmarking: Total cost at {total}% of revenue — benchmark against competitors.
exec_act_cost_monitoring: Watch costs monthly — COGS {cogs}% and overheads {opex}% leave little room.
exec_act_cost_overrun_review: Costs are too high at {cogs}% COGS + {opex}% overhead. Review urgently.
exec_act_supplier_review: Raw material cost is above average ({cogs_curr}% vs {cogs_avg}%). Renegotiate.
exec_act_risk_maintain: Risk is low — maintain current controls and monitoring.
exec_act_risk_mitigation: {risk_factors} risk issue(s) identified. Build a mitigation plan.
exec_act_risk_immediate: Financial stability indicators are deteriorating. Act now.
exec_act_collections_overdue: Customers owe money for {dso} days on average. Chase invoices.
exec_act_collections_watch: Receivables at {dso} days. Target is under 30 days.
exec_act_earnings_stability: Profit is inconsistent (score {score}/100). Stabilise the revenue base.
stmt_page_subtitle: Income Statement · Balance Sheet · Multi-Period View
stmt_header_summary_fallback: Use the comparison table and interpretation below to review how revenue, costs, and profit moved versus the prior period.
stmt_no_data: No data — upload a Trial Balance first
stmt_waterfall_subtitle: Revenue → Gross Profit → Operating Profit → Net Profit
exp_flag_cogs_high: COGS at {pct}% of revenue — above healthy threshold.
exp_flag_concentration: {name} represents {pct}% of revenue — high concentration risk.
exp_flag_opex_high: Operating expenses at {pct}% of revenue — review fixed costs.
exec_lang_cogs_improved: Cost of goods improved — build on this to widen profit margins.
exec_lang_cogs_worsened: Cost of goods rising — review suppliers and product mix urgently.
exec_lang_dol_risk: Profits are sensitive to any revenue drop — protect the revenue base.
exec_lang_receivables_slow: Cash is being held up in collections — follow up on overdue invoices.
exec_lang_cash_lag: Not all profits are converting to cash — tighten collections and stock control.
exec_lang_margin_healthy: Margins are healthy — focus on growing revenue to amplify profits.
exec_lang_margin_warning: Margins are thinning — costs are growing faster than revenue.
exec_lang_growth_strong: Business is growing well — protect what is driving this growth.
exec_lang_growth_stalled: Growth has paused — identify new revenue opportunities.
exec_lang_cost_improving: Cost efficiency is improving — formalise savings in supplier contracts.
exec_lang_cost_pressure: Cost pressure building — total costs taking more of every revenue dollar.
exec_lang_risk_low: Financial position is stable — maintain current discipline.
exec_lang_risk_elevated: Financial risks are elevated — review and act on flagged issues.
exec_lang_liquidity_ok: Sufficient cash and working capital — no immediate liquidity concern.
exec_lang_liquidity_tight: Liquidity is tightening — accelerate collections and review payables.
exec_lang_yoy_positive: This year is tracking better than last year — sustain momentum.
exec_lang_salary_rising: Payroll costs are climbing — review headcount productivity.
exec_lang_fixed_costs_high: Fixed costs are high relative to revenue — use revenue growth to dilute them.
kpi_hover_revenue_up: Revenue (definition): total top-line inflow for the period. Interpretation: Revenue is increasing. Impact: strengthens Financial Performance and expands capacity for investment if margins hold.
kpi_hover_revenue_down: Revenue (definition): total top-line inflow for the period. Interpretation: Revenue is declining. Impact: increases Liquidity Risk and margin pressure unless Total Costs adjust quickly.
kpi_hover_revenue_flat: Revenue (definition): total top-line inflow for the period. Interpretation: Revenue is stable. Impact: Net Profit improvement must come from Cost Efficiency and pricing discipline.
kpi_hover_expenses_up: Operating Expenses (definition): overhead and operating costs excluding Cost of Goods Sold. Interpretation: Operating Expenses are rising. Impact: compresses Net Profit and reduces Financial Health unless Revenue grows faster.
kpi_hover_expenses_down: Operating Expenses (definition): overhead and operating costs excluding Cost of Goods Sold. Interpretation: Operating Expenses are declining. Impact: supports Net Margin expansion and improves Financial Health if service levels remain stable.
kpi_hover_expenses_flat: Operating Expenses (definition): overhead and operating costs excluding Cost of Goods Sold. Interpretation: Operating Expenses are stable. Impact: focus on Revenue Drivers and Cost of Goods Sold to improve Net Profit.
kpi_hover_profit_up: Net Profit (definition): Revenue minus Total Costs for the period. Interpretation: Net Profit is improving. Impact: strengthens Financial Health and increases capacity for growth and risk mitigation.
kpi_hover_profit_down: Net Profit (definition): Revenue minus Total Costs for the period. Interpretation: Net Profit is under pressure. Impact: reduces Financial Health and increases Risk Level; prioritize Cost Drivers and pricing actions.
kpi_hover_profit_flat: Net Profit (definition): Revenue minus Total Costs for the period. Interpretation: Net Profit is stable. Impact: sustained improvement requires Revenue growth or structural cost reduction.
kpi_hover_margin_up: Net Margin (definition): Net Profit as a % of Revenue. Interpretation: Net Margin is expanding. Impact: indicates stronger pricing power and/or Cost Efficiency—protect it as a strategic advantage.
kpi_hover_margin_down: Net Margin (definition): Net Profit as a % of Revenue. Interpretation: Net Margin is compressing. Impact: signals Cost Pressure or pricing weakness—act before Financial Health deteriorates.
kpi_hover_margin_flat: Net Margin (definition): Net Profit as a % of Revenue. Interpretation: Net Margin is stable. Impact: to lift profitability, improve Cost Efficiency or strengthen Revenue Drivers.
kpi_hover_cf_up: Operating Cash Flow (definition): cash generated from core operations. Interpretation: cash conversion is improving. Impact: improves Liquidity, reduces Risk Level, and increases flexibility for strategic action.
kpi_hover_cf_down: Operating Cash Flow (definition): cash generated from core operations. Interpretation: cash conversion is weakening. Impact: increases Liquidity Risk; prioritize Working Capital actions (Receivables, Inventory, Payables).
kpi_hover_cf_flat: Operating Cash Flow (definition): cash generated from core operations. Interpretation: cash conversion is stable. Impact: maintain discipline; improvements come from Working Capital and Profitability levers.
exec_dol_high: Profit is highly sensitive to revenue — protect your top line
exec_dol_medium: Moderate operating leverage — business is balanced
exec_dol_low: Low leverage — stable profit regardless of small revenue swings
exec_dol_explain: Every 1% revenue change moves profit by
exec_dso_high: Cash collection is slower than expected — follow up on receivables
exec_ccc_high: Cash is tied up in operations longer than ideal
exec_liquidity_strong: Company has strong ability to meet short-term obligations

gen_create_hint: Create or select a company to begin

Insufficient data for forecasting.
Upload more periods.

upload_modal_replace_subtitle: You can replace the current data with the new upload
upload_modal_replace_warning: Current data for this period will be permanently replaced. This cannot be undone.
upload_modal_scope_period_hint: Deletes all uploads for this period + derived branch data
upload_modal_warn_period: All uploads for this period and derived data will be permanently deleted
upload_modal_warn_single: This upload record and its associated file will be permanently deleted
upload_tb_balanced_title: TB balanced: total debits = total credits
upload_tb_unbalanced_title: TB unbalanced: total debits ≠ total credits
gen_no_companies: No companies linked to your account
al_ytd_missing_warn: YTD {year}: {n} month missing — totals are incomplete
al_ytd_missing_warn_p: YTD {year}: {n} months missing — totals are incomplete
al_fy_partial_warn: Current year {year} has only {n} months — comparison is partial, not annualized
dec_no_data: No recommendations available yet. Upload financial data, then run Financial Intelligence to generate recommendations.
dec_sc_combined_desc: Increase Revenue by 5% while reducing Cost of Goods Sold and Operating Expenses
dec_sc_increase_revenue_desc: Increase Revenue by 5% without changing cost structure
dec_sc_reduce_cogs_desc: Reduce Cost of Goods Sold by 2% through procurement or efficiency
dec_sc_reduce_opex_desc: Reduce operating expenses by 2% through process improvements
nar_no_data: Click Generate to produce an executive narrative
rep_no_data: Click Generate to build the board report
dec_just_combined: The combined scenario delivers maximum impact. The primary driver is {lever_label}, contributing most of the {np_delta} net profit improvement. At {np_pct}% profit growth and {mm_pp} pp margin improvement, this scenario outperforms all single-lever alternatives.
dec_just_increase_revenue: Revenue growth is the single highest-impact lever available. A 5% increase adds {np_delta} to net profit ({np_pct}%) with no change to cost structure, making it the lowest-risk path to improved profitability.
dec_just_reduce_cogs: COGS reduction directly improves gross margin. A 2% procurement or efficiency improvement adds {np_delta} to net profit ({np_pct}%) with zero revenue dependency — the most defensible improvement in uncertain markets.
dec_just_reduce_opex: Operating cost reduction flows directly to the bottom line. A 2% OpEx reduction adds {np_delta} to net profit ({np_pct}%) and improves net margin by {mm_pp} pp through process efficiency.
dec_ins_combined: Combined: +5% revenue, -2% COGS, -2% OpEx delivers {np_delta} additional net profit ({np_pct}%), improving net margin by {mm_pp} pp.
dec_ins_increase_revenue: A 5% revenue increase adds {rev_delta} in revenue, lifting net profit by {np_delta} ({np_pct}%) and net margin by {mm_pp} pp.
dec_ins_reduce_cogs: A 2% reduction in COGS improves gross margin and adds {np_delta} to net profit ({np_pct}%), with no revenue risk.
dec_ins_reduce_opex: A 2% reduction in operating expenses adds {np_delta} to net profit ({np_pct}%) with immediate margin uplift of {mm_pp} pp.
alerts_none: No alerts — financial position looks healthy
cfo_dec_no_data: Run analysis to see CFO-level decisions
dec_v2_no_data: Press 'Get Decisions' to see CFO-level priorities
rc_no_data: Press 'Analyse Root Causes' to understand WHY decisions are needed
fc_no_data: Press 'Generate Forecast' to project next 3 months
port_no_data: Press 'Load Portfolio' to compare all companies
domain_liquidity_exp: Ability to meet short-term obligations with available cash and liquid assets.
domain_profitability_exp: How efficiently the business converts revenue into profit at gross and net levels.
domain_efficiency_exp: How quickly the business collects cash, manages inventory, and pays suppliers.
domain_leverage_exp: The level of debt relative to equity and total assets.
domain_growth_exp: Revenue and net profit versus the prior period — whether growth converts to results.
kpi_revenue_exp: Total income from operations before any deductions.
kpi_profit_exp: Revenue minus all costs — the final bottom-line result.
kpi_cashflow_exp: Cash generated from core business operations (not financing or investing).
kpi_margin_exp: Percentage of each revenue unit retained as net profit.
banner_all_good: All clear — no critical issues detected
kpi_explain_revenue: Revenue: total top-line inflow for the period. Interpretation: the growth engine. Impact: higher Revenue improves scale economics only if Total Costs do not rise faster.
kpi_explain_net_profit: Net Profit: Revenue minus Total Costs for the period. Interpretation: the bottom-line result. Impact: sustained Net Profit funds growth, reduces Risk Level, and strengthens Financial Health.
kpi_explain_cashflow: Operating Cash Flow: cash generated from core operations. Interpretation: earnings quality. Impact: strong cash conversion reduces Liquidity Risk and improves decision flexibility.
kpi_explain_net_margin: Net Margin: Net Profit as a % of Revenue. Interpretation: profitability per unit of Revenue. Impact: small changes in Net Margin compound into meaningful profit over time.
kpi_explain_expenses: Total Costs: operating spend for the period. Interpretation: efficiency vs growth. Impact: cost discipline protects margin; cuts should not starve revenue engines.
kpi_explain_working_capital: Working Capital: short-term assets minus short-term liabilities. Interpretation: operational funding buffer. Impact: negative WC signals liquidity strain; positive WC supports stability.
stmt_insight_low_net_margin: Net margin of {val}% is below healthy levels. Cost reduction or pricing improvement needed.
stmt_insight_negative_working_capital: Working capital is negative ({val}). The business owes more short-term than it holds in current assets.
stmt_insight_cashflow_below_profit: Operating cash flow ({cf}) is below net profit ({np}). Collections may be lagging behind recorded revenue.
stmt_insight_low_current_ratio: Current ratio of {val}x means short-term obligations may not be fully covered by liquid assets.
stmt_insight_cashflow_positive: Operating cash flow is positive — the business is generating real cash from operations.
stmt_insight_strong_gross_margin: Gross margin of {val}% is healthy — the business generates strong value from its core operations.
dash_ocf_estimate_banner: Estimated — single period only. Upload prior period for accurate OCF.
dash_health_narrative_excellent: Company is performing at an excellent level. Maintain the current trajectory.
dash_health_narrative_good: Solid performance with clear room to improve.
dash_health_narrative_risk: Financial position is at risk. Executive intervention required now.
fc_custom_scope_hint: Custom scope: select From and To period first.
upload_tb_type_hint: Helps the system balance the balance sheet correctly
upload_tb_type_tooltip_pre: IS accounts still open — system adds Net Profit to equity
upload_tb_type_tooltip_post: Closing entries already done — system does not touch equity
tb_type_unknown: Setting TB type improves balance sheet accuracy
bs_unbalanced_reason_tb_type: Balance Sheet is not balanced because tb_type is not set. Net Profit was not added to equity. Set tb_type on upload to fix this.
bs_unbalanced_reason_post: Post-closing TB: Net Profit already in retained earnings (not re-injected). If BS is still unbalanced, check account mapping.
balance_two_checks: Two separate checks: (1) TB: debits = credits — and — (2) BS: assets = liabilities + equity
branch_no_data_title: No financial data uploaded for this branch yet.
branch_no_data_hint: Upload a Trial Balance and select this branch to start tracking.
upload_viewer_notice: You have view-only access. Upload is disabled for your role.
members_viewer_notice: You have view-only access to this company.
role_owner_perms: Full access · Manage members · Upload · All analysis
role_analyst_perms: Upload data · Run analysis · Invite members
board_footer: Generated by VCFO — Confidential — For Board Use Only
no_risks: No significant risks detected in the current reporting period.
cover_health_note: Financial health assessed across profitability, liquidity, and trend direction.
branch_count_note: Branch data based on latest available period per branch.
board_footer_full: Generated by VCFO — Confidential — For Board Use Only
branch_no_active_hint: No active branches. Add or activate a branch to see data here.
upload_branch_company_hint: Optional — link this upload to a branch, or keep company-level only.
upload_no_branches_hint: No branches exist for this company yet. Create branches on the Branches page.
err_no_financial_data: No financial data uploaded yet. Upload a Trial Balance first.
dq_cashflow_np_mismatch: Cash flow vs Net Profit mismatch
opp_revenue_momentum_reason_yoy: Revenue up {pct} YoY — consolidate this growth
analysis_top_issues_sub: Issues requiring immediate or near-term attention
analysis_no_critical_issues: No critical issues at this time ✓
analysis_top_opps_sub: Areas with potential for improvement or investment
analysis_spine_subtitle: Read top to bottom: latest statement, period change, margins, bridge, then the structured profit story.
analysis_summary_no_bullets: Add comparable periods or open supporting sections below for KPI and ratio detail.
analysis_collapsed_support_title: Supporting detail (context, issues, KPIs, ratios, cash)
exec_action_strip_ranked_sub: Ranked by priority and expected impact
exec_root_causes_sub: The underlying causes behind current issues
exec_breakdown_sub: Key financial ratios from the latest period
cashflow_negative: Cash flow negative — requires immediate monitoring
profitability_root_causes_sub: Root causes behind the current profitability position
liquidity_why_sub: Why is liquidity at this level?
efficiency_sub: Speed of asset turnover and cash collection
bs_not_balanced_msg: BS Not Balanced — Assets ≠ Liabilities + Equity
bs_unbalanced_cause_tb_type: Cause: tb_type not set — Net Profit was NOT added to equity. Set tb_type on upload to fix.
bs_unbalanced_cause_other: Possible cause: account mapping error or missing data in this period.
bs_check_note: Note: This is the Balance Sheet check (Assets = L+E) — separate from TB check (Debits = Credits)
cf_estimated_hint: Estimated — upload a prior period for accurate indirect-method OCF
cf_reliability_estimated_note: Requires ≥2 periods to compute real WC delta changes
cf_reliability_real_note: WC deltas computed from 2 actual balance sheet periods
cfo_ai_placeholder: Ask any financial question… (Enter to send)
cfo_sugg_prof_2: Is this a cost or revenue problem?
cfo_sugg_risk_1: What is the most critical issue?
cfo_sugg_cmp_2: Why did it change in this period?
cfo_sugg_val_1: What is the impact on the numbers?
cfo_sugg_exec_1: What is the most critical area?
cfo_panel_welcome:
Hello 👋 I'm your CFO intelligence assistant.

Financial health: **{health}/100**

{top}

Ask me about profitability, cash flow, risks, or growth.
cfo_select_company: Select a company to load financial data
board.summary.health_with_mom: The company's financial position is classified as «{health_label}» with a net margin of {nm} and revenue growing {rev_mom} MoM.
board.summary.health_no_mom: The company's financial position is classified as «{health_label}» with a net margin of {nm}.
board.outlook.np_loss: Indicators point to continued profitability pressure; cash flow requires close monitoring.
board.outlook.rev_np_improving: Positive momentum in both revenue and profit suggests continued improvement, provided cost discipline is maintained.
board.outlook.rev_improving: Revenue is growing, but profit margins need close monitoring to ensure growth translates into actual profitability.
board.outlook.stable_focus: Financial indicators are stable; cost efficiency and growth quality are the priority focus areas for the coming period.
decision.causal.liq_immediate_cashflow.c: Liquidity stress: current ratio is {cr} — cash and working-capital coverage need immediate attention.
Short-term solvency signals are weak; the current ratio {cr} sits below a prudent operating floor.
decision.causal.liq_immediate_cashflow.a: Prioritize cash conversion, AR/AP terms, and a rolling cash forecast; line up contingency funding if covenants are tight.
decision.causal.liq_strengthen_working_c: Working capital needs strengthening: current ratio {cr}x vs 6M avg {cr_roll6m}x (Δ {delta_cr_vs_roll6m}); quick {qr}x; WC {wc}.
Latest liquidity is weaker than the recent rolling baseline (Δ vs 6M: {delta_cr_vs_roll6m}); domain «{domain}» priority rank {decision_priority_rank} — review WC structure and cash conversion.
Improve WC discipline (inventory, receivables, payables) and align financing with seasonal cash peaks.
decision.causal.prof_margin_recovery.cha: Net margin {nm}% vs 6M avg {nm_roll6m}% (Δ {delta_nm_vs_roll6m} pp) — {per_pp} per point makes margin recovery a top CFO lever.
decision.causal.prof_margin_recovery.cau: Margin is below target and vs recent baseline (Δ {delta_nm_vs_roll6m} pp); small moves still move P&L materially ({per_pp}).
decision.causal.prof_margin_recovery.act: Run a margin bridge (price, mix, COGS, OpEx); assign owners and a 30–60 day action plan.
decision.causal.prof_cost_structure_revi: Gross margin {gm}% vs 6M avg {gm_roll6m}% (Δ {delta_gm_vs_roll6m} pp) — cost structure and pricing need executive scrutiny.
Gross margin vs rolling baseline (Δ {delta_gm_vs_roll6m} pp) signals mix, procurement, or pricing pressure.
Segment COGS by product/channel; benchmark suppliers; target quick wins on waste, terms, and discounting.
decision.causal.paradox_growth_negative_: Revenue is growing but profitability remains negative
Cost structure is exceeding revenue growth — operating margin {operating_margin_pct}%, expense ratio {expense_ratio_pct}%, trailing 3M revenue growth {revenue_growth_3m_pct}% vs prior 3M.
Analyze cost breakdown (COGS vs OPEX) and identify break-even point
decision.causal.eff_cash_cycle_optimizat: Cash conversion cycle is {ccc} days — operational cash is tied up in the business.
CCC length indicates receivables, inventory, and/or payables policy are constraining liquidity ({freed} illustrative release at scale).
Jointly attack DSO, inventory days, and DPO; align sales incentives with collectible cash timing.
decision.causal.eff_receivables_manageme: DSO is {dso} days — collections and credit quality need focused management.
Receivable duration increases working-capital risk and masks true cash earnings power.
Segment aging, tighten limits for slow payers, automate dunning, and tie KPIs to cash collected.
decision.causal.lev_debt_reduction.chang: Leverage at debt-to-equity {de} — balance-sheet risk is elevated versus prudent targets.
decision.causal.lev_debt_reduction.cause: Higher leverage raises sensitivity to rates, covenants, and downturn cash coverage.
decision.causal.lev_debt_reduction.actio: Map maturities and covenants; retire highest-cost debt first; pause non-strategic spending until leverage improves.
decision.causal.growth_revenue_accelerat: Revenue momentum: 3M avg MoM {rev_roll_3m}%, YoY {yoy_rev_pct}%, CAGR {cagr_rev_pct}% — direction {rev_dir} (domain «{domain}», rank {decision_priority_rank}).
Magnitude-backed growth signals (rolling / YoY / CAGR) support selective acceleration if unit economics and capacity hold.
Pick 1–2 levers, fund from operating cash where possible, and track weekly leading indicators.
Revenue momentum ({rev_ytd}) with headroom to widen margin through efficiency and mix.
Top-line strength can fund process and procurement improvements that compound margin.
Pair growth investments with productivity targets; guard gross margin with price/mix rules.
narrative.causal.margin_pressure.change: Margin pressure in «{domain}» context ({merged_count} merged signal(s)) — gross margin is under strain versus revenue momentum.
narrative.causal.margin_pressure.cause: COGS and revenue dynamics suggest gross-margin squeeze; multiple drivers may be active in the same domain.
narrative.causal.margin_pressure.action: Address price, mix, and COGS concurrently; freeze non-essential OpEx until margin trajectory stabilizes.
narrative.causal.cost_spike.change: Operating cost intensity rose materially in «{domain}» ({merged_count} merged signal(s)).
narrative.causal.cost_spike.cause: Expense ratio momentum outpaced revenue, compressing operating margin.
narrative.causal.cost_spike.action: Audit variable spend, renegotiate contracts, and reset OpEx budgets to a sustainable revenue share.
narrative.causal.profit_growth_quality_i: Profit growth is lagging revenue in «{domain}» ({merged_count} merged signal(s)) — quality of growth is questionable.
Incremental revenue is being absorbed by cost or weaker-margin mix.
Trace margin by segment; tighten discounting; improve unit economics on new revenue.
narrative.causal.strong_profitability.ch: Strong profitability signal in «{domain}» ({merged_count} merged signal(s)) — margins are healthy versus thresholds.
narrative.causal.strong_profitability.ca: Net margin strength indicates pricing power and/or cost control relative to peers.
narrative.causal.strong_profitability.ac: Protect margin through discipline; reinvest selectively in scalable growth and balance-sheet resilience.
narrative.causal.cost_anomaly.change: Cost anomaly flagged in «{domain}» ({merged_count} merged signal(s)) — COGS moved sharply versus revenue.
narrative.causal.cost_anomaly.cause: Sudden COGS share shifts often reflect mix, input prices, or one-off items.
narrative.causal.cost_anomaly.action: Validate drivers within 2 weeks; correct pricing or sourcing; rule out misclassification.
narrative.causal.margin_anomaly.change: Margin anomaly in «{domain}» ({merged_count} merged signal(s)) — net margin is weak with deteriorating profit momentum.
narrative.causal.margin_anomaly.cause: Low margin plus negative profit momentum raises operating-loss risk if uncorrected.
narrative.causal.margin_anomaly.action: Emergency margin diagnostic: pricing, variable cost pressure, and capacity utilization.
narrative.causal.expense_outlier.change: Expense load outlier in «{domain}» ({merged_count} merged signal(s)) — OpEx share of revenue is structurally high.
narrative.causal.expense_outlier.cause: Elevated OpEx ratio limits shock absorption and investment capacity.
narrative.causal.expense_outlier.action: Line-item review with targets to restore a sub-threshold expense ratio within 2–3 quarters.
narrative.causal.revenue_drop.change: Revenue contraction signal in «{domain}» ({merged_count} merged signal(s)).
narrative.causal.revenue_drop.cause: Top-line decline pressures cash, fixed-cost coverage, and strategic flexibility.
narrative.causal.revenue_drop.action: Activate pipeline recovery: customer retention, pricing, and quick cost flex tied to volume.
ai_cfo.decision.COST_REDUCTION.change: Heuristic stance COST_REDUCTION — risk {risk_score}/100, priority {priority}, loss flag {is_loss}.
ai_cfo.decision.COST_REDUCTION.cause: Expense load and margin position imply cost takeout is the primary lever.
ai_cfo.decision.COST_REDUCTION.action: Target 5–10% OpEx reduction on non-core lines; renegotiate suppliers; track weekly savings vs plan.
ai_cfo.decision.SCALE_UP.change: Heuristic stance SCALE_UP — risk {risk_score}/100, priority {priority}, loss flag {is_loss}.
ai_cfo.decision.SCALE_UP.cause: Margins and growth momentum support controlled capacity or go-to-market expansion.
ai_cfo.decision.SCALE_UP.action: Fund growth from operating cash; pilot before scale; monitor margin and WC weekly.
ai_cfo.decision.OPTIMIZE.change: Heuristic stance OPTIMIZE — risk {risk_score}/100, priority {priority}, loss flag {is_loss}.
ai_cfo.decision.OPTIMIZE.cause: Performance sits in a mid band where targeted efficiency beats broad cuts.
ai_cfo.decision.OPTIMIZE.action: Pick 2–3 KPIs (margin, CCC, OpEx ratio) and run 90-day improvement sprints.
ai_cfo.decision.RESTRUCTURE.change: Heuristic stance RESTRUCTURE — risk {risk_score}/100, priority {priority}, loss flag {is_loss}.
ai_cfo.decision.RESTRUCTURE.cause: Margin and cost structure suggest a broken or overstretched operating model.
ai_cfo.decision.RESTRUCTURE.action: Reset cost base, simplify SKUs/locations, and secure liquidity while restructuring.
ai_cfo.decision.CLOSE.change: Heuristic stance CLOSE — risk {risk_score}/100, priority {priority}, loss flag {is_loss}.
ai_cfo.decision.CLOSE.cause: Persistent losses with critical expense load imply existential cash risk.
ai_cfo.decision.CLOSE.action: Model wind-down vs turnaround; engage stakeholders; protect employee and creditor obligations legally.
ai_cfo.decision.MONITOR.change: Heuristic stance MONITOR — risk {risk_score}/100, priority {priority}, loss flag {is_loss}.
ai_cfo.decision.MONITOR.cause: Signals are marginal; premature action could disturb a stabilizing trend.
ai_cfo.decision.MONITOR.action: Watch revenue and margin for two more closes; pre-position contingency plans without executing yet.
expense_deep.pressure.cogs_material_vs_o: Full cost load materially exceeds OpEx-only view — COGS-inclusive base dominates versus operating expenses.
Total cost ratio and OpEx ratio gap indicates gross-margin and direct-cost levers matter as much as OpEx.
Joint review of COGS, pricing, and procurement alongside OpEx; avoid optimizing only one layer.
expense_deep.pressure.opex_elevated.chan: Operating expense ratio versus revenue is elevated versus internal SME thresholds.
expense_deep.pressure.opex_elevated.caus: OpEx threshold status «{opex_threshold_status}» with total-cost status «{total_cost_threshold_status}».
expense_deep.pressure.opex_elevated.acti: Line-item OpEx audit; contract renegotiation; defer discretionary programs until ratio normalizes.
expense_deep.pressure.total_cost_elevate: Full cost load (COGS + OpEx + unclassified debits) versus revenue is elevated.
Total-cost threshold status «{total_cost_threshold_status}»; pressure level {pressure_level}; {flag_count} structural flag(s).
Holistic cost program: COGS, OpEx, and P&L classification hygiene with monthly steering reviews.
expense_deep.pressure.neutral_bands.chan: Cost ratios sit in neutral bands versus default SME thresholds; maintain monitoring.
expense_deep.pressure.neutral_bands.caus: Pressure branch «{pressure_branch}»; OpEx status «{opex_threshold_status}»; total-cost status «{total_cost_threshold_status}».
expense_deep.pressure.neutral_bands.acti: Continue category-level monitoring; escalate if any metric crosses warning thresholds for two consecutive closes.
profitability_deep.note.operating_pressu: Operating cost pressure is high — cost ratios worsened materially versus the prior period.
Prioritize gross-margin and OpEx levers with a 30-day executive action list and weekly variance review.
profitability_deep.note.volatile_earning: Profit volatility exceeds revenue volatility — earnings are less predictable than sales.
Investigate one-offs, revenue mix, and timing; smooth lumpy items; tighten forecast ranges.
profitability_deep.note.deteriorating_ea: Several consecutive weak profit momentum readings — trend deterioration risk.
Confirm cost and price discipline; stop-loss rules on negative-margin sales; weekly P&L bridge.
profitability_deep.exec.strong_but_heavy: Profitability is strong on net margin but the combined cost load versus revenue is heavy.
Rule {rule_id}: revenue trend {revenue_trend_direction}, profit trend {net_profit_trend_direction}, period revenue up {revenue_up_period}.
Protect margin while rationalizing cost structure; avoid growth that dilutes unit economics.
profitability_deep.exec.margins_declinin: Margins are declining with expense-ratio pressure in the window.
Rule {rule_id}: revenue trend {revenue_trend_direction}, profit trend {net_profit_trend_direction}, period revenue up {revenue_up_period}.
Target OpEx and COGS levers; reset pricing where justified; track margin weekly.
profitability_deep.exec.rev_not_profit.c: Revenue momentum is not flowing through to profit — growth quality issue.
Rule {rule_id}: revenue trend {revenue_trend_direction}, profit trend {net_profit_trend_direction}, period revenue up {revenue_up_period}.
profitability_deep.exec.rev_not_profit.a: Margin diagnostics by segment; cut unprofitable volume; align incentives to net profit.
profitability_deep.exec.neutral.change: Profitability metrics are within the observed band; maintain disciplined monitoring.
profitability_deep.exec.neutral.cause: Rule {rule_id}: revenue trend {revenue_trend_direction}, profit trend {net_profit_trend_direction}, period revenue up {revenue_up_period}.
profitability_deep.exec.neutral.action: Keep standard margin and cost ratio reviews; no broad action until a threshold breach.
profit_story.paradox_growth_loss.what_ch: Profit bridge ({previous_period} → {latest_period}): revenue moved {delta_rev_fmt} while net profit moved {delta_np_fmt}. COGS {delta_cogs_fmt}, OpEx {delta_opex_fmt}.
profit_story.paradox_growth_loss.why: Revenue growth did not translate into profit — cost absorption exceeded the revenue gain (bridge primary mover: {primary_driver}).
profit_story.paradox_growth_loss.action: Reconcile the period bridge to COGS and OpEx accounts; executive review of {primary_driver} and pricing/cost pass-through.
profit_story.cost_pressure.what_changed: Profit bridge: net profit {delta_np_fmt} with OpEx {delta_opex_fmt} and revenue {delta_rev_fmt} ({previous_period} → {latest_period}).
profit_story.cost_pressure.why: Operating expense movement is the largest bridge driver versus revenue and COGS — OpEx pressure dominated the P&L path.
profit_story.cost_pressure.action: Target OpEx categories with the largest period deltas; tie spend to revenue and margin guardrails.
profit_story.margin_compression.what_cha: Profit bridge: net profit {delta_np_fmt}; COGS {delta_cogs_fmt}; gross profit {delta_gp_fmt}; revenue {delta_rev_fmt} ({previous_period} → {latest_period}).
profit_story.margin_compression.why: COGS movement is the dominant bridge lever — gross margin compressed before operating costs.
profit_story.margin_compression.action: Review COGS drivers (input prices, mix, waste); align pricing and procurement to recover gross margin.
profit_story.healthy_growth.what_changed: Profit bridge: net profit {delta_np_fmt} with revenue {delta_rev_fmt} as the primary driver ({previous_period} → {latest_period}).
profit_story.healthy_growth.why: Top-line expansion led the P&L improvement with net margin context {nm_pct}% — growth is funding profit.
profit_story.healthy_growth.action: Protect gross and operating margin while scaling; monitor COGS and OpEx pass-through as revenue grows.
profit_story.profit_recovery.what_change: Profit bridge: net profit {delta_np_fmt} led by revenue {delta_rev_fmt}; latest net margin {nm_pct}% ({previous_period} → {latest_period}).
profit_story.profit_recovery.why: Profit improved while net margin remains below a typical health band — recovery is underway but margin discipline stays critical.
profit_story.profit_recovery.action: Lock in revenue gains; continue cost and pricing actions until net margin clears sustainable targets.
profit_story.mixed.what_changed: Profit bridge ({previous_period} → {latest_period}): revenue {delta_rev_fmt}, COGS {delta_cogs_fmt}, OpEx {delta_opex_fmt}, net profit {delta_np_fmt}.
profit_story.mixed.why: Offsetting movements across revenue, COGS, and OpEx — no single bridge line clearly dominated the outcome.
profit_story.mixed.action: Walk the full waterfall (revenue → COGS → OpEx → net); prioritize the next-largest absolute delta after executive review.
cmd_cc_story_empty: No structured profit story for this scope (needs comparable periods and a complete bridge). Open Analysis for full detail.
cmd_bridge_drill_accounts_hint: Account-level lines for this P&L bucket are in Analysis → Statements (same period window).
cmd_bridge_expl_revenue_positive: Revenue increased versus the prior period — generally supportive for profit.
cmd_bridge_expl_revenue_negative: Revenue decreased versus the prior period — a headwind unless costs fell faster.
cmd_bridge_expl_revenue_neutral: Revenue was flat versus the prior period.
cmd_bridge_expl_cogs_positive: COGS increased — typically pressure on gross margin.
cmd_bridge_expl_cogs_negative: COGS decreased — typically supportive for gross margin.
cmd_bridge_expl_cogs_neutral: COGS was flat versus the prior period.
cmd_bridge_expl_opex_positive: Operating expenses increased — pressure on operating profit unless revenue outpaced it.
cmd_bridge_expl_opex_negative: Operating expenses decreased — a tailwind for operating profit.
cmd_bridge_expl_opex_neutral: Operating expenses were flat versus the prior period.
cmd_bridge_expl_net_profit_up: Net profit improved versus the prior period.
cmd_bridge_expl_net_profit_down: Net profit declined versus the prior period.
cmd_bridge_expl_net_flat: Net profit was flat versus the prior period.
cmd_bridge_expl_primary_driver_match: This line had the largest absolute movement among revenue, COGS, and OpEx in the bridge.
cmd_bridge_expl_paradox_growth_loss: Revenue and net profit moved in opposite directions — worth reconciling cost absorption and timing.
